title: Response Policy
description: Policy that shapes how a CAP-aware system produces its next response. Constrains tone, claim strength, and budget usage.

max_claim_strength.description: Maximum allowed claim strength for this turn. Should not exceed rag_confidence.

require_uncertainty_marker.description: If true, response must explicitly mark its uncertainty.

require_source_citation.description: If true, factual claims must cite a source.

forbid_self_justification.description: If true, the system must not defend a previous output merely because it generated it.

budget_cap_percent.description: Maximum AllowedTotalRisk for this response, as a percentage.

fallback_operator.description: Operator to fall back to if the recommended operator is inadmissible.
